issues.description: Trigger type is incorrect. Card text describes a conditional cost reduction (passive ability), not an event trigger. Should use 'Activated' or a passive condition check, not 'Trigger'.
Action type 'Rest' is completely wrong. Card grants cost reduction (−3 cost), not a Rest action. Should use 'PowerBoost' with cost modifier.
Target is wrong. Action targets opponent's characters, but effect should target 'this card' in hand for cost reduction.
Missing all three required conditions: LeaderHasType {Fish-Man}, LeaderLife ≤3, and OpponentRestingCards ≥5. DSL has no conditions array.
